title: The challenge of evaluating technology in an agentic world
our_synthesis: karak-curated theme→blip mapping. The theme frames how the Radar's traditional evaluation cadence is strained by AI-tool churn; map this to blips that show semantic-diffusion symptoms. Fetch the Thoughtworks narrative from source_url at use time.

title: Retaining principles, relinquishing patterns
related_blip_names: Measuring collaboration quality with coding agents
Curated shared instructions for software teams
our_synthesis: karak-curated. Counterbalance theme — fundamentals (clean code, deliberate testing, zero trust) endure while collaboration patterns shift around coding agents. Useful when architecture-principles asks 'what still holds?'.

title: Securing permission-hungry agents
our_synthesis: karak-curated. The 'lethal trifecta' framing (broad access × prompt injection × inconsistent agent behavior) is the macro signal here. Any Caution-ringed agentic blip should be read against this theme.

title: Putting coding agents on a leash
our_synthesis: karak-curated. Harness engineering theme — feedforward (specs, skills) + feedback (compilers, tests, mutation, fuzzers) controls bracket the agent. Use this theme to justify why a Trial-ring blip belongs in a delivery pipeline today.
